untranslatable_reason: Signal requires calculation of percent deviation of implied volatilities (IV) across multiple options strikes. This requires: (1) access to options chain data with individual IV values per strike, (2) ability to calculate statistical dispersion (percent deviation/coefficient of variation) across those IV values. The allowed indicators do not include individual option IV data or a percent_deviation_iv indicator. While india_vix and hvol_20 measure volatility, they are single aggregate values, not option-chain-level IV deviation metrics required by this signal.
translation_notes: This is an options-specific vol arbitrage signal that requires options market microstructure data (IV skew/smile analysis) rather than price-based technical indicators. Implementation would require custom options analytics outside the standard indicator set.
